title: Run integration verification, quickstart smoke, coverage, and PR gate evidence
depends_on: T017: empty/new composer Workflows launch wired
T023: non-empty Chat Workflows strategy UI wired
objective: Run full feature verification and record changed files, tests, quality report, coverage report, live/provider blocker, residual risks, and project cognition follow-up.
write_scope: Only files already touched by T003-T023 when fixing integration defects
implementation handoff notes created by the implementation workflow
expected_outputs: Implementation handoff evidence （新建/修改 by implementation workflow）
Focused fixes in previously touched source/test files only if gates expose defects
anti_goals: Do not claim ready without gate evidence or exact blocker.
Do not commit artifacts/quality-runs or artifacts/coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Quickstart scenarios are covered by automated tests or manual smoke evidence/blocker.
Provider-backed summarize live evidence is run when credentials exist, otherwise exact blocker is recorded.
Project cognition follow-up is recorded for source/runtime route/service changes.
